creator: mm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Update for:
http://www.freebsd.org/platforms/amd64/motherboards.html

Mainboard ASUS A8V-Deluxe running on a server for over 3 years
(currently running FreeBSD 6.2-STABLE-amd64)
There are problems with the onboard Promise RAID controller.

Fix: 

Link and data (dmesg, dmidecode, pciconf, acpidump) are at:
http://people.freebsd.org/~mm/amd64
